title: Financial Security System to Assist Seafarers in Case of
content: 21 Abandonment, Sickness, Injury, Disappearance, Death or Other Causes. In 22 accordance with the MLC 2006, as amended, on financial security for vessels, the 23 shipowner shall provide an expeditious and effective financial security system to assist 24 seafarers in the event of their abandonment and to assure compensation for contractual 25 claims in the event of the seafarer’s sickness, injury, disappearance, death or other 26 causes occurring while they are serving under a seafarer’s employment contract, or 27 arising from their employment under such agreement. 28 29 The certificate or other documentary evidence of financial security cover shall contain the 30 following information: 31 32 (a) Name of the ship; 33 (b) Port of registry of the ship; 34 (c) Call sign of the ship; 35 (d) IMO number of the ship 36 (e) Name and address of the provider or providers of the financial security; 37 (f) Contact details of the persons or entity responsible for handling seafarers’ request 38 for relief; 39 (g) Name of the shipowner; 40 (h) Period of validity of the financial security; and 41 (i) An attestation from the financial security provider that the financial security meets 42 the requirements of the MLC 2006, as amended. 43 44
